headline: Cybersecurity Goes Vertical: CIBR Just Crushed the S&P 500 by Three to One
summary: A dollar in First Trust NASDAQ Cybersecurity ETF (NASDAQ:CIBR) on the last trading day of 2025 was worth about $1.22 by the close on June 5, 2026, while the same dollar in the S&P 500 was worth about $1.08. headline: How Is Fortinet's Stock Performance Compared to Other Cybersecurity Stocks?
summary: Fortinet has notably outperformed the Cybersecurity industry over the past year, but analysts are cautious about the stock’s prospects.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Fortinet, Raises Price Target to $180
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Tal Liani   maintains Fortinet (NASDAQ:FTNT) with a Buy and raises the price target from $130 to $180.

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Fortinet, Raises Price Target to $160
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Shaul Eyal   maintains Fortinet (NASDAQ:FTNT) with a Buy and raises the price target from $125 to $160.
